Proposed B46 SBS service between DeKalb Av and Avenue U (Kings Plaza)
B46 Limited generally travels between Kings Plaza and Williamsburg Bridge Plaza; makes all local stops north of DeKalb Ave and south of Ave H
B46 Local generally travels between Kings Plaza and DeKalb Ave; proposed to be extended to Williamsburg Bridge Plaza, making all stops along Broadway 24 hours per day
